title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (26) لسنة 2000 بشأن تنظيم إجراءات دعاوي إكتساب الأسماء والألقاب وتعديلها
title_en: Decree No. (28) of 2000 ratifying the Convention between the Government of The State of Bahrain and the Government of Syrian Arab Republic for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Tax Evasion with respect to Taxes on Income
